summary: Phase 3 hardening validation. Backend: all checks pass (health endpoint returns expected fields, /api/admin/redeploy returns 401 for missing/wrong secret, code inspection of server.py confirms env_preserved/git_fetch/git_reset present in robust webhook, pytest = 3 passed + 2 intentionally skipped). Frontend file inspection passes (lazy/Suspense in App.js, Onboarding.jsx exists & is rendered in Dashboard.js, react-joyride declared in package.json). HOWEVER, frontend dev build is broken by a compile error in Onboarding.jsx: `import Joyride from 'react-joyride'` is incorrect — react-joyride@3.0.2 has NO default export, only the named `Joyride`. The webpack 'Compiled with problems' overlay blocks the UI on every route in dev. Production build would also fail. This is a HIGH-priority 1-line fix that the main agent must apply.

ui_bugs.issue: Compile error: `import Joyride from 'react-joyride'` fails because react-joyride@3.0.2 publishes ONLY named exports (Joyride, STATUS, ACTIONS, EVENTS, LIFECYCLE, ORIGIN, PORTAL_ELEMENT_ID, defaultLocale, defaultOptions, useJoyride). No `default` export exists in dist/index.mjs. Webpack shows 'Compiled with problems' red overlay covering the entire page on every route in dev. Fix: change line 2 to `import { Joyride, STATUS } from 'react-joyride';`

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/components/Onboarding.jsx line 2: replace `import Joyride, { STATUS } from 'react-joyride';` with `import { Joyride, STATUS } from 'react-joyride';` (react-joyride v3 dropped the default export, see possible exports list in the webpack error).
critical_code_review_comments: The 1-line default-vs-named import bug in Onboarding.jsx would have been caught by `yarn build` or even an initial page load — strongly recommend adding a CI step that fails on webpack compile errors.
server.py is now 2361 lines — still well over the 700-line guideline; should be split into routers (auth, projects, redeploy, exports, pwa, desktop).

The redeploy endpoint relies on `touch backend/server.py` to trigger uvicorn --reload. If watchfiles is debouncing or the process is healthy but watchfiles is paused, the new code may not actually load. Consider an explicit health-check loop after touch to confirm uvicorn picked up the new commit.
react-joyride is in package.json but no ErrorBoundary wraps the Onboarding component — if the tour throws on a future version bump, Dashboard will white-screen for every authenticated user.

success_rate.backend: 100% (3/3 non-gated pytest cases passing; 2 happy-path tests intentionally skipped per RUN_REDEPLOY_HAPPY_PATH gate)
success_rate.frontend: 75% (file structure & lazy loading correct, but Onboarding.jsx import is broken, blocking the dev build with a fullscreen overlay)

test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md missing — not relevant for this iteration (auth flow not tested per agent_to_agent_context_note).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Phase 3 webhook IS robust and IS deployed — DO NOT POST to /api/admin/redeploy with the real DEPLOY_SECRET (it triggers `git reset --hard origin/main` and wipes uncommitted changes). The 401 auth gating + health checks are sufficient. Pytest already covers these. The ONE remaining issue is the Onboarding.jsx import line; after the main agent fixes line 2, just curl the landing page and confirm no webpack error overlay (the page should render the CodeForge AI hero without the red 'Compiled with problems' banner).
rca of the issue: Root cause: react-joyride v3.0.0 (released 2025) migrated to named exports ONLY; the legacy `import Joyride from 'react-joyride'` pattern that worked in v2.x silently fails in v3. The package.json pin is `^3.0.2` so the breaking change is in scope. Webpack reports it as: `export 'default' (imported as 'Joyride') was not found in 'react-joyride' (possible exports: ACTIONS, EVENTS, Joyride, LIFECYCLE, ORIGIN, PORTAL_ELEMENT_ID, STATUS, defaultLocale, defaultOptions, useJoyride)`. Reproduction: visit https://no-code-builder-25.preview.emergentagent.com/login — full-page red error overlay appears on top of the login form. Mitigation: 1-line change `import { Joyride, STATUS } from 'react-joyride';` in /app/frontend/src/components/Onboarding.jsx — no other files affected because Onboarding is the only consumer.
